name: Installing Offline POS
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can install Offline POS capability for "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " terminals, enabling local transaction processing during internet outages and automatic synchronization when connectivity returns. This helps optimize your retail operations by ensuring business continuity during connectivity issues, preventing lost sales from internet outages, and maintaining customer service regardless of network status."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS allows you to continue serving customers if your internet connection is interrupted or you're unable to access Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/208263254", "frameAttributes": {"width": "640", "height": "385"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/208263254", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "640", "height": "385"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Before you Begin"}], "data-id": "before-you-begin"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You only need to install Offline POS on one Windows machine in your store. If you have multiple Outlets or Stores, it should be installed once in each location."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You will need an internet connection to download, install and synchronise Offline POS"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Installation can take up to 60mins if Windows Updates are required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The initial synchronisation timeframe will vary depending on the size of your database and internet speed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once Offline POS has been installed you will be able to continue trading while the first synchronisation occurs in the background"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Installing Offline POS"}], "data-id": "installing-offline-pos"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Ensure you have installed the latest Windows Updates before beginning the installation."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure you have applied all "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/update-windows-10-3c5ae7fc-9fb6-9af1-1984-b5e0412c556a", "children": [{"text": "Windows Updates"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Download the installation file (if you're unsure how to determine the correct version please refer to the articles for "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.microsoft.com/en-au/help/13443/windows-which-operating-system", "children": [{"text": "Windows 10"}]}, {"text": " or "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.microsoft.com/en-au/help/827218/how-to-determine-whether-a-computer-is-running-a-32-bit-version-or-64", "children": [{"text": "older Windows versions"}]}, {"text": ")"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://prdappstoetm001.blob.core.windows.net/offlineclientinstallersandutilities/Retail Express Offline POS (64 bit).exe", "children": [{"text": "64-bit installation"}]}, {"text": "\n"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://prdappstoetm001.blob.core.windows.net/offlineclientinstallersandutilities/Retail Express Offline POS (32 bit).exe", "children": [{"text": "32-bit installation"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Run the downloaded file"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tick the box "}, {"text": "I agree to the license terms and conditions", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If Windows ? User Account Control appears, click "}, {"text": "Yes", "bold": true}, {"text": " to allow Retail Express to make the changes and continue"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppPTyEAM.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppPTyEAM.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "offlinepos_installation_3.JPG"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Leave the Destination Folder as default and click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "Retail Express Client ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "Click here for instructions on accessing your Client ID"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your Retail Express "}, {"text": "Username", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Password", "bold": true}, {"text": " (the same used for POS) and click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Outlet", "bold": true}, {"text": " (or store) and click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS is only available to be installed on ONE PC per Outlet/Store. If your required Outlet is not available here, or if you've previously installed Offline POS on another PC in-store, please contact "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.retailexpress.com.au/contact", "children": [{"text": "Support"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Network Settings will be displayed, click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once Offline POS has been installed, if you change the network connection you will need to reinstall Offline POS using the new network settings"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " to complete the installation. This process will take a few minutes."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Finish", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Close", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
